title: More and More Armor
description: More then a dozen different armor pieces and sets with different abilities!
body:
![Title image in a dark and light purple crystal(amethyst) texture that says "MORE AND MORE ARMOR"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5d853a289426333bbea37b9fd9c6e8fb2caea38.png)
![chest opened with custom items inside with player looking into the chest](https://i.postimg.cc/pL8DnPKZ/COMPRESSEDpromo-material-2.png)


### More and More Armor is a port from an original data pack that adds a dozen armor sets and types! Try out different armor pieces that will buff your experience while maintaining balanced recipes! More and More Armor adds endgame armor after netherite, which adds more direction for the game or your modpack!

**More and More Armor has a lot of recipes and i recommend that you [view the Wiki](https://bit.ly/morearmorwiki)**

# FAQ
**Can I use More and More Armor in my modpack?**
- Absolutely! As long as the mod is not edited or commercialised yourself
- I am also happy to make edits to the mod for your modpack! Just join the discord server and make a ticket
  
**Updates?**
- More and More Armor is still in support and is getting updated.
- More and More Armor v1.2 is coming before August 10 2025

**Why pick More and More Armor?**
- More and More Armor adds armor sets that simply make the game easier and more fun. While also adding 2 different end game armor pieces after netherite which give unique effects and needs.

**Are there advancements?**
- Yes! More and More Armor issues unique advancements based off each armor set. This gives a more fun player experience while also making it easier for datapackers and modders to use the achievement as a toggles!

## Elevate Your Armored Experience

Step into the world of **More and More Armor** and witness the transformation of your Minecraft armor adventure. Break free from the constraints of vanilla armor sets and embrace the power to create, enhance, and explore like never before. Become the ultimate player and redefine your journey in Minecraft. Install **More and More Armor** today and start crafting your legacy.
